⚔ ARCANE RUSH

Fan made tool, not affiliated with or endorsed by Gear Games Inc. Card data and art are sourced live from the official Arcane Rush Wiki.
👑 Your Hero
🏆 Your Final Board 0 / 6
✋ Your Hand 0 cards

Cards some dealers can pull from your hand mid combat, for example on death or when taking damage. Click the ✋ on any card below to add it here.

💎 Your Relics 0 relics

No fixed limit, since relic slots depend on how long the match runs. Click a relic under the Relics tab below to add it here.

Saved in this browser. Use "Share Link" or "Export" on a build to share it with others, or publish it to the Community.
